name: Low-Fat Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Prune puree or prepared prune butter
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees. Coat baking sheets with vegetable cooking spray; set aside.
In a large bowl, beat prune puree or butter, sugars, egg whites, and vanilla to blend thoroughly.
In a small bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
Stir dry ingredients into prune mixture, mixing completely.
Stir in chocolate pieces.
Drop tablespoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets; flatten slightly.
Bake for about 10 minutes until lightly browned around the edges.
Remove from racks to cool completely. Makes about 60 (2 1/4-inch) cookies.
